pc_policy: hard stand-alone PC hit veto; no joint classifier
geometry_warning: full-aperture axisymmetric candidates cover charged-particle corridors and are ideal upper bounds, not installable designs

definitions.gamma_intercept: at least one unique gamma track enters the first PC Pb layer
definitions.intrinsic: PC plastic hit conditional on gamma_intercept
definitions.effective: PC plastic hit including geometry and conversion/response
